title: Cortina Audit Handoff Response v1
description: Audit response for handoff completeness checks at the cortina-canopy boundary. Producer: cortina/src/handoff_audit.rs (AuditOutput). Consumer: canopy/src/runtime.rs (CortinaAuditResponse). Cortina audits a handoff markdown file, analyzes checklist items for implementation evidence, and returns a decision (proceed or flag for review) with optional reasoning.

status.description: Audit decision: whether the handoff appears sufficiently complete to proceed.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for flagging review, if status is flag_review.

result.description: Detailed audit result (provided for transparency, not consumed by canopy).

handoff_file.description: Path to the audited handoff file.

total_items.description: Total number of unchecked checklist items in the handoff.

likely_implemented.description: Number of items with explicit implementation evidence.

evidence.description: Per-item audit evidence for each checklist item.

checklist_item.description: Text of the checklist item being audited.

file_exists.description: Whether referenced files exist in the repository.

symbol_found.description: Whether referenced symbols were found in those files.

confidence.description: Confidence level of the audit for this item.

matched_paths.description: File paths where evidence was found.
